codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original watcher/path-capture commit together with the fix commit. The fix resolves the prior VAL-RECOVERY-004 blocker by making fallback missionDir resolution prefer the preserved base/original Mission session id, then threading that value through session persistence, restore, session-id replacement handling, IPC requests, and restart watch/read flows so rebased sessions still resolve the correct Mission directory after restart.

summary: Pass: the original base-session fallback defect is resolved. `resolveMissionDirPath` now uses `missionBaseSessionId` when explicit `missionDir` is unavailable, session save/load/replace and restored buffers preserve that base id, AppInitializer passes it into missionDir read/watch restart flows, and updated tests prove fallback recovery still finds `~/.factory/missions/<baseSessionId>` after session-id replacement without introducing new blocking issues in the touched scope.
